---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken in Codexa
labels: ["bug"]
---

<!--
Thanks for filing a report. Most bugs get triaged faster with:

  - a minimal reproduction
  - the exact command you ran
  - Node / Codexa versions
  - what you expected vs what happened

Please fill the sections below. Everything marked required is required for me
to reproduce — a report without it is likely to sit unactioned.
-->

## What happened (required)

<!-- One or two sentences. Not a stack trace — the summary a human would give. -->

## Minimal reproduction (required)

<!--
Either:
  - a small standalone test case (a few files, a command, expected vs actual), or
  - a link to a public repo that reproduces the issue
-->

## Command you ran

```bash
# paste exactly
```

## What you expected to happen

## What actually happened

<!-- include stack traces, CLI output, or MCP payloads if relevant -->

## Environment (required)

- Codexa version: <!-- output of `node dist/cli.js --version` or the npm version -->
- Node version: <!-- output of `node --version` -->
- OS + arch: <!-- e.g. Linux x86_64, macOS arm64 -->
- Repo kind being indexed: <!-- language mix, approximate size -->

## Anything else

<!--
Screenshots, logs, or hypotheses about cause. Optional.

If you have a fix in mind, mention it — it's usually easier to open a PR
referencing this issue than to describe the fix in prose.
-->
